info.title: ButtonBreakSwitch
info.author: StrongEnough
info.details: This a port of the Button Break Wii U homebrew, and after I ported it to Wii, I knew I had to Put it on the Switch. This will soon later be like the Button Break app from the Wii U.

changelog: v0.1.0 - Added all the buttons pressable, except the SL and SR buttons.
